overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through the desert Badlands at night in Cyberpunk 2077, ascending a rocky hillside toward a ridge overlooking the distant neon-lit Night City skyline. The scene features Joshua trees, rocky terrain, and a prominent red neon billboard visible against the dark teal night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert hillside slope with distant neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking up the rocky desert slope with Night City visible in the distance to the right

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside terrain forming the left boundary of the path
large illuminated red billboard with 'NIGHT CITY' text visible against the dark sky
tall communications tower with red warning lights atop the ridge
sandy and rocky ground with sparse desert vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark desert hillside at night, with the camera ascending a rocky slope. A prominent red neon billboard is visible to the right, and a radio tower with red lights stands silhouetted against the teal night sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper desert slope with increasing elevation and scattered Joshua trees

events.description: ambient light decreases as the camera moves into a darker section of the hillside terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing the steep ascent up the terrain, moving through sparser vegetation toward the ridge

entered.detail: distinctive desert trees with spiky branches silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera continues ascending the hillside through darker terrain, with Joshua trees beginning to appear. The neon billboard falls behind and out of view as the elevation increases, while the radio tower draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert ridge crest with panoramic view of illuminated city

events.description: cresting the hill reveals the full Night City skyline and downtown lights ahead

agents.ego_description: reaching the ridge top and taking in the expansive view of the illuminated city below

entered.detail: distant urban skyline with numerous building lights and neon illumination visible across the valley

segments.scene_description: Upon cresting the ridge, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City sprawling in the distance below. Joshua trees frame the view on both sides as the camera moves along the ridge line, with the city lights twinkling against the dark landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert ridge trail overlooking Night City with neon signage

events.description: the neon billboard becomes visible again on the right as the camera moves along the ridge

agents.ego_description: traversing the ridge line among Joshua trees with the city skyline and neon signs visible ahead

entered.detail: the same large red billboard reappearing on the right side of the frame
large rock formation on the left side of the ridge path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving along the desert ridge with Joshua trees silhouetted against the night sky. The Night City skyline remains visible ahead while the neon billboard reappears on the right, creating a framed view of the distant metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a dark desert hillside that culminates in a panoramic reveal of a distant, neon-lit metropolis. It begins by climbing a rocky slope under a teal night sky, with a red neon billboard to the right and a silhouetted radio tower ahead. As the camera gains elevation, the billboard fades from view and the terrain grows darker, punctuated by the emergence of scattered Joshua trees. The scene then opens wide upon cresting the ridge, shifting from the enclosed hillside to a breathtaking vista of the sprawling Night City skyline twinkling in the distance. Finally, the camera glides along the ridge line through silhouetted trees before the red neon billboard reappears on the right to frame the glowing city ahead.
